caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, a green t-shirt, and black headphones sits in a studio environment, speaking into a professional black microphone. His t-shirt features the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT". The background consists of a wall adorned with numerous framed photographs and a clothing rack with various garments, including a white mannequin wearing a white shirt. To the left and right of the man, logos are visible on the screen: a circular black and white logo containing the text "RIDE" and "SIT" on the left, and a red and white logo reading "RIDE" and "SIT" on the right. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, shifting his facial expressions and slightly moving his head as he speaks, while the camera angle and background elements remain static.
